class.name: AudioImporterFmod
class.brief_description: Editor import plugin for importing audio files as FMOD audio streams.
class.description: AudioImporterFmod is an editor plugin that handles importing audio files into [FmodAudioStream] resources. It integrates with Godot's import system to provide seamless audio asset management. Supported formats include common audio types like MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, and others supported by FMOD. The importer processes audio files during project import, creating optimized [FmodAudioStream] resources that can be used with [FmodAudioStreamPlayer] and [FmodAudioSampleEmitter].

method.name: _get_importer_name
method.description: Returns the unique identifier for this importer.

method.name: _get_import_options
method.description: Returns the import options available for this importer.

method.name: _get_option_visibility
method.description: Returns whether a specific import option should be visible in the UI.

method.name: _get_preset_count
method.description: Returns the number of import presets available.

method.name: _get_preset_name
method.description: Returns the name of the import preset at the given index.

method.name: _get_recognized_extensions
method.description: Returns the list of file extensions this importer can handle (e.g., mp3, wav, ogg).

method.name: _get_resource_type
method.description: Returns the resource type produced by this importer ([code]"FmodAudioStream"[/code]).

method.name: _get_save_extension
method.description: Returns the file extension used for imported resources.

method.name: _get_visible_name
method.description: Returns the display name shown in the import dialog.

method.name: _import
method.description: Performs the actual import of the source audio file into a [FmodAudioStream] resource. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success, or an error code on failure.
